methodology: Traced the final Vite entry point through AppRoutes and RecognitionWorkspace.
Searched surviving imports and tests after replacing the legacy route graph.
Removed only modules with zero surviving required references, then ran TypeScript, Vitest, ESLint, Vite build, and Playwright.
